---
mode: agent
description: Create a new feature spec for a Jira ticket
---

Read and follow the instructions in `commands/spec.md` exactly.

The user will provide a ticket number and requirement — which may be a short title
or a long multi-paragraph story. Either is valid input.

Before writing anything, run the cortex queries defined in `commands/spec.md`
to pull real team context from the knowledge base.
